channel.title: Writing on ChengAo Shen
channel.description: Recent content in Writing on ChengAo Shen

item.title: 📜Notes on LaTeX formulas
item.description:
$\LaTeX$ is a document preparation system used for the communication and publication of scientific documents. However, it’s not easy to use this to write formulas, especially for the beginners, typically how to choose the right font and Greek letter.

This essay is a note for me to remember the latex formulas, which have vairous fonts and Greek letter. Furthermore I also record some special symbols that can be used in the Future papers.
